title: Love, What It Is
content:
Love is a circle, that doth restless move
In the same sweet eternity of Love.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Love, What It Is", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
